Meet Dr. S Manohar Meet our experienced piles doctor at Gopal Rao’s Piles Clinic in Mumbai Dr. S Manohar! Get the care you deserve and bid farewell to discomfort. 15+ Years of experience Highly Equipped Clinic Good quality care & service Book an Appointment Dr. Mukesh Kota is a dedicated and skilled medical professional, specializing in Piles, Fissure, and Fistula treatments. He completed his MBBS from Andhra Pradesh in the year 2016, having studied at the esteemed Fathima Institute of Medical Science. Dr. Kota’s passion for surgery became evident during his internship, where he developed a keen interest in surgical procedures. Professional Training and Experience: Dr. Mukesh Kota received invaluable guidance and training from his father, Dr. S. M. Kota, who is an experienced practitioner in the field of Piles, Fissure, and Fistula. During his college breaks, Dr. Mukesh Kota actively participated in his father’s clinic, where he gained hands-on experience in wound dressing and administering fluids to patients. His compassionate and polite demeanor earned him a reputation for providing sound advice and personalized treatment recommendations. Piles, Fissure, and Fistula Expertise: With seven years of dedicated practice, Dr. Mukesh Kota has successfully treated a significant number of patients suffering from Piles, Fissure, and Fistula. His expertise in these conditions has led him to establish his own specialized clinic, Gopal Rao’s Piles And Ano-Rectal Centre, located at Dadar TT Circle. Driven by a commitment to patient care, Dr. Kota ensures that each individual receives the utmost attention and comprehensive treatment for their condition. At Gopal Rao’s Piles And Ano-Rectal Centre, Dr. Mukesh Kota and his team provide a range of advanced treatments, including surgical interventions, non-surgical procedures, and effective management plans tailored to each patient’s specific needs. By combining his medical expertise, experience, and compassionate approach, Dr. Kota strives to offer the best possible outcomes and a higher quality of life for individuals dealing with Piles, Fissure, and Fistula. If you’re seeking expert care and personalized treatment for Piles, Fissure, or Fistula, Dr. Mukesh Kota and his team at Gopal Rao’s Piles And Ano-Rectal Centre are here to help. Contact us today to schedule a consultation and take the first step towards better health and well-being. Dr. Mukesh Kota Featured on Mid-Day Dr. Mukesh Kota Shares 5 Effective Ways to Treat and Prevent Piles Dr. Mukesh Kota suggests exercising regularly for 30-45 mins as it helps eliminate constipation and abdominal pain and helps with digestion. Every year, around 11 million people are expected to develop piles in India, and the number is increasing rapidly in urban areas. Due to a sedentary lifestyle, increased consumption of junk food, stress, constipation and poor eating habits, piles are forming rapidly.
